title: Construction, Invariants, Dataclasses, and Slots · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: Build trustworthy catalog, member, and loan objects from validated external records. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in validated library entity types and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish object allocation in __new__ from initialization in __init__ and override either only for justified behavior.
Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.
Implement classmethod alternate constructors that normalize external representations through one invariant path.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
